sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tapidaw ihmu nawn ken
Mi ngah na'ng sep theih lai seem
Khut zepin ding mawk ding maw
Topa in thu hong pia leh.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pai in seem! ding kipan in
Pai in zong A mangte gum
Khuamialna sung mawh nei mi
Tua pawi-ah hong paipih in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa min na it ding hiam
Hong ciamna na um zo diam
Sapna teng A kiang ngen in
Hong sapna na nial ding maw.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na san'sa bangin um in
Hong hilh bangin nungta in
Ama a bek hi den in
Sepna tawh upna lak in.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Singlamteh i puak ding om
Kham lukhu na khuk nop leh
Thathak tawh ma i sawt ding
A hun tom, a nite tom.
